is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study genotyped P. falciparum isolates from febrile patients in Mauritania.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Only MSP1, MSP2, and GLURP polymorphic markers were analysed; no drug-resistance codon positions (Pfcrt, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1, Pfcytb) were reported.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Allelic family frequencies (MSP1/MSP2) are given but none relate to curated drug-resistance markers.

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples from two named sites: Aioun and Kobeni in Hodh El Gharbi, southern Mauritania.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected at the end of 1998 during an epidemic - single year window.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field blood samples from febrile patients collected in Mauritania (African country).

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical genotyping field study of 386 samples.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples collected during an in vivo drug resistance study in Hodh El Gharbi; routine field collection, no consortium overlap indicated.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary data referenced; the paper simply does not study drug-resistance markers.

assessment.summary: Population structure study of P. falciparum from an epidemic in southern Mauritania (Aioun and Kobeni), genotyping MSP1, MSP2, and GLURP for genetic diversity. It reports no curated drug-resistance codon markers, so it is ineligible.
exclusion_reasons: Does not report any target drug-resistance codon markers (only MSP1, MSP2, GLURP genotyping markers)
